name: center-feedback-suppression
description: Verify combat and action feedback does not create central text, icons, or world damage numbers while preserving action feedback events.

args.code: local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=99,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-80)) p:SetAttribute("LastWallHit",0) return c:Invoke("PunchRadius")

local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local gui=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local center,damage=0,0 for _,d in ipairs(gui:GetDescendants()) do if d.Name=="FeedbackPop" or d.Name=="CombatDamageBurst" or d.Name=="CombatImpactCore" or d.Name=="CombatSparkRays" then center+=1 end end for _,d in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do if d.Name=="LocalDamageNumber" then damage+=1 end end local lastType=gui:GetAttribute("LastFeedbackType") return H:JSONEncode({enabled=gui:GetAttribute("CenterActionFeedbackEnabled"),toasts=gui.Toasts.Visible,rewards=gui.RewardPops.Visible,center=center,damage=damage,feedback=gui:GetAttribute("FeedbackCount") or 0,lastType=lastType,lastTypeValid=type(lastType)=="string" and lastType~=""})

steps.label: no text or icon feedback appears over gameplay
